note: Chunk-level BM25 retrieval was run when PDFs were available. Sentence/window-level retrieval requires rebuilding sentence corpus from PDFs, which are no longer in the workspace. Header-only placeholder CSVs are created so downstream canonicalizer ablation can run 6/8 chunk-based selectors.
downstream_impact: sentence_bm25_top1 and window_bm25_top1 selectors in canonicalizer_ablation_v1 will return empty results (blocked). Other 6 selectors run on chunk retrieval.
